public_safety_note: This file is safe demo seed data. It intentionally avoids publishing raw private medical, benefits, family, financial, or provider evidence in the public repository.

patient_tags.public_label: Prefers written, typed, and iPad-readable communication support
Longitudinal medical timeline required; source confirmation pending in private vault
Functional limitation and assistive device documentation needed
ODSP/OW/MCCSS style case administration and document tracking
Home setup, support planning, and physical binder organization
Family-facing explanation and support requests need neutral framing
Telecom/device/billing dispute timeline and evidence package
Household planning around incoming twins; private specifics omitted
Founding user is also product builder and field tester

seed_events.title: ODSP meeting / review preparation
seed_events.notes: Exact time/location must be confirmed from private calendar/email before use in a final human-facing document.

seed_events.title: Expected twins due-date window / household readiness planning
seed_events.notes: Use as planning anchor only; confirm with private medical/calendar source before external presentation.

memory_seed.statement: User benefits from written-first outputs that can be read on an iPad or spoken through text-to-speech.
User often needs complete copy/paste-ready files, code blocks, or GitHub-ready structures rather than vague instructions.
Final human-facing outputs should distinguish confirmed facts, user-reported facts, inferred patterns, missing evidence, and next actions.
Raw medical, benefits, family, financial, and provider evidence must stay out of the public repository unless explicitly redacted and approved.

skills_seed.name: Generate audience-specific handshake
skills_seed.next_build_step: Add UI button that creates a handshake from selected event + selected evidence.

skills_seed.name: Create system heartbeat
skills_seed.next_build_step: Create scheduled job that writes heartbeat JSON into private Drive and public redacted summary into repo.

skills_seed.name: Detect urgent blinks
skills_seed.next_build_step: Add Sheet formulas or Apps Script rules for deadline, source gap, failed job, and unprocessed attachment alerts.

skills_seed.name: Prepare investor/live demo brief
skills_seed.next_build_step: Create one-page investor story and demo route inside the app.
